parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.label: API Key
parameters.help: Your Docuplete API key (starts with `sk_live_`). Find it in your Docuplete dashboard under **Settings → API Keys**.

parameters.name: baseUrl
parameters.label: API Base URL
parameters.help: Leave as-is unless your organization uses a custom domain. Must not include a trailing slash.

filter.name: Unauthorized
filter.message: Invalid API key. Please double-check your key in Docuplete → Settings → API Keys.
